---
title: "main_loop.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\main_loop.py"
loc: 138
complexity: 20
logic_score: 4.78
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 7.20
overall_score: 2.68
---

## Intent
The `main_loop.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on ShutdownHandler, __init__, shutdown, daemon_loop, highlander_check, DaemonOrchestrator, ensure_bootstrapped, load_config, load_target_repos, get_interval, load_persona, _highlander_check, daemon_loop. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via ShutdownHandler, __init__, shutdown, daemon_loop, highlander_check, DaemonOrchestrator, ensure_bootstrapped, load_config, load_target_repos, get_interval, load_persona, _highlander_check, daemon_loop. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 72 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [os](file://os)
- [signal](file://signal)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [psutil](file://psutil)
- [colorama](file://colorama)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.sentinel.repo_spoke](file://src.sentinel.repo_spoke)
- [src.core.utils](file://src.core.utils)
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)

### Exports
- `ShutdownHandler`
- `__init__`
- `shutdown`
- `daemon_loop`
- `highlander_check`
- `DaemonOrchestrator`
- `ensure_bootstrapped`
- `load_config`
- `load_target_repos`
- `get_interval`
- `load_persona`
- `_highlander_check`
- `daemon_loop`
